title: Favorite
description: Schema for favorites documents in the video-game-305 Firestore database. Each document represents one game saved to a user's favorites list.

game_name.description: The name of the favorited game

game_pic.description: URL to the game's cover art image

user_ref.description: Firestore document reference path pointing to the user's document in the users collection (e.g. users/uid)

user_id.description: The user's ID stored as an integer in this collection
